indices.name: KOSPI
indices.original_text: The benchmark KOSPI rose 1.32% to close at 4,905 on Monday, extending gains to fresh record highs. South Korea's main stock market index, the KOSPI, rose to 4888 points on January 19, 2026, gaining 0.98% from the previous session. Historically, the South Korea Stock Market reached an all time high of 4898.88 in January of 2026.

rates.name: US 10Y Treasury Yield
rates.original_text: The US 10-year yield rose to 4.23% on Friday, its highest level in over four months. The yield on US 10 Year Note Bond Yield rose to 4.23% on January 16, 2026, marking a 0.05 percentage points increase from the previous session.

fx.original_text: The USD/KRW exchange rate rose to 1,473.6500 on January 19, 2026, up 0.01% from the previous session. Over the past month, the South Korean Won has strengthened 0.40%, but it's down by 2.40% over the last 12 months.
